'''Brakka Barakas''' was an elder of [[New Brigia]]. Brakka taken as a hostage by the [[Yevetha]] during the attack on the [[Brigian]] colony of New Brigia. Along with the other hostages taken during the [[Yevethan Purge]], Brakka was forced to record a message begging the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] not to fire on Yevethan ships carrying prisoners. The Yevetha played the messages during the [[Battle of Doornik-319]], causing hesitation from the New Republic ships and forcing them to withdraw. Later, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] learned that he and all the other prisoners of the [[Yevetha]] had been freed by the ''[[Star Morning]]'' thanks to the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]].
